title: Fryed Eggs
description: Fried eggs is a Datapack that adds different ways to cook eggs and other dishes that are usually eaten for breakfast
body:

# **Instructions:**

Fried eggs is a datapack that adds different ways of cooking eggs and other dishes that are usually eaten at breakfast
Note: All food that is cooked is done on a campfire or in a smoker or in an oven.
